danger_signals.visual_form: Equipment in specialized rooms (e.g., Inflator) becomes visually damaged or emits warning indicators when unmaintained
danger_signals.meaning: Neglected maintenance creates immediate hazard; room occupants can be killed if not addressed

danger_signals.visual_form: Patient removal from hospital or death notification during emergency events
danger_signals.meaning: Failed treatment or expired emergency time limit results in patient death, reputation damage

danger_signals.visual_form: Rapid disease spread visualized through increasing affected patient count and potential health inspector arrival
danger_signals.meaning: Uncontrolled epidemic threatens hospital reputation and financial viability; can result in fines if exposed

danger_signals.visual_form: Rats appear in hospital corridors and rooms, interactable by player cursor
danger_signals.meaning: Environmental contamination; player must actively eliminate rats to maintain facility cleanliness

danger_signals.visual_form: Staff members display complaint behavior or argument indicators
danger_signals.meaning: Unpaid or overworked staff will leave hospital, reducing operational capacity

safety_signals.visual_form: Medical machinery in rooms remains operational and functional
safety_signals.meaning: Regular handyman maintenance ensures safe patient treatment and prevents explosions

safety_signals.visual_form: Benches, fire extinguishers, plants, and staff rooms present in corridors and designated areas
safety_signals.meaning: Player-provided comfort and safety infrastructure supports patient satisfaction and staff morale

safety_signals.visual_form: Patient progression through GP office → specialist diagnosis → treatment room → discharge
safety_signals.meaning: Proper workflow and equipped rooms indicate healthy hospital operations

safety_signals.visual_form: Reputation metric displayed and influenced by successful treatment and VIP visits
safety_signals.meaning: Hospital standing affects patient flow and revenue; VIP satisfaction grants bonuses

safety_signals.visual_form: Doctor statistics visible; trained specialists assigned to appropriate rooms
safety_signals.meaning: Skilled staff with proper specialization ensures quality treatment and reduces treatment failures

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Computer rival hospitals operated by AI opponents (named after fictional/real computers: Holly, Deep Thought, etc.)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Hospital layout, room types, and patient flow patterns reflect player design choices and operational philosophy

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Inspector appears during epidemics if disease is not contained; represents external oversight
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Epidemic visible in hospital; inspector arrival signals regulatory failure and impending fines

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Disease affliction visual representation (e.g., swollen head for Bloaty Head, alien appearance for Alien DNA)
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Comical disease manifestations distinguish patient types; some diseases represent pop culture references
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Different patient types queue for different specialized rooms; visual symptoms communicate diagnostic needs
VIP tour events occur; successful impression grants cash bonus or reputation increase; failed tour damages hospital standing

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Empty hospital with basic blueprint placement; limited room types available; minimal staff and patient presence
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player given time to construct facility before patient influx; basic hiring and room setup required

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Populated hospital with functioning rooms; patient queues at GPs and treatment facilities; staff distributed across departments
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Patients follow diagnostic and treatment workflows; staff perform assigned duties; hospital generates revenue

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Sudden influx of patients requiring immediate treatment; time-limited objective displayed; critical care demand spike
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Patients must be cured within deadline or die; emergency management becomes primary focus; reputation at risk

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Rapid spread of single disease type throughout hospital; multiple infected patients visible; epidemic counter displayed
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player can attempt to conceal outbreak by rapid treatment; health inspector arrival imminent if disease not contained; fines and reputation damage if exposed

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Medical equipment in specialized rooms shows damage or degradation; visual indicators of poor upkeep
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Unmaintained machines malfunction and explode; room occupants killed; handyman intervention required; player-controllable repair

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Reputation metric displays declining status; fewer patients attract to hospital; competitor hospitals gain advantage
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Patient flow decreases; revenue drops; recovery requires successful operations and positive events (VIP visits)

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Staff members display argument or complaint indicators; visual indicators of low morale
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Staff demand pay increases; overworked staff leave hospital; reduced operational capacity without replacement hiring

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Distinguished visitor appears in hospital; tour route through facilities highlighted
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player attempts to showcase hospital quality; successful impression grants bonuses; failed impression damages reputation

environmental_storytelling.example: Patient with 'Bloaty Head' displays visually swollen cranium; 'King Complex' patient imitates Elvis; 'Alien DNA' patient transformed into alien appearance—diseases communicate condition severity and treatment requirements through visual symptoms
Hospital layout reflects player design choices; professional vs. neglectful hospitals reveal different architectural standards and maintenance priorities through room arrangement and equipment states
Inflator room machines deteriorate visually when unmaintained; explosion aftermath in room indicates previous neglect; visual damage progression communicates consequence of inattention

environmental_storytelling.technique: Queue behavior as system health indicator
environmental_storytelling.example: Long patient queues in corridors and at reception indicate bottlenecks in diagnosis/treatment; queue length visually communicates operational efficiency or failure
Visible rat infestation in corridors represents poor facility sanitation; active rat elimination required; pest presence communicates environmental neglect
Staff visible in rooms or corridors; concentration of staff in particular areas indicates workload focus; empty rooms suggest abandonment or understaffing

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Exits hospital; contributes to satisfaction and hospital reputation; positive financial transaction
Queues at GP office; seeks specialized diagnosis based on suspected condition; waits for treatment assignment
Occupies specialized treatment room; undergoes cure procedure; either recovers or dies if treatment fails or timeout expires
Appears during emergency event with time limit; must be cured before deadline or dies; increases hospital pressure
Can operate in specialized rooms (Research, Operating Theatre); higher competency improves treatment success
Limited to GP office; cannot perform specialized procedures; requires training to unlock advanced rooms
Performs assigned duties; remains in hospital; maintains productivity
Argues about pay; threatens to leave hospital; reduced work efficiency; leaves if demands not met
Takes breaks; may leave room without permission if policy allows; productivity declines
Repairs and maintains medical equipment; prevents machine deterioration and explosions
Equipment in rooms deteriorates; machines malfunction and explode; room occupants killed
Manages patient intake; processes patient registrations; affects queue flow
Visible in corridors and rooms; actively avoids/attacks player cursor; represents sanitation failure
Arrives if epidemic not contained; assesses hospital conditions; issues fines and reputation penalties if outbreak discovered
Tours hospital; evaluates facility quality; grants cash/reputation bonuses if impressed; damages reputation if disappointed
Operates as independent hospital entity; competes for reputation and patients; visual indicator of competitive landscape

notes: Theme Hospital's manifestation layer relies heavily on visual disease representations and facility condition indicators to communicate world state. The game uses comical disease manifestations as both gameplay mechanics and narrative devices—diseases like 'Bloaty Head' are immediately recognizable through visual deformation, creating intuitive diagnostic cues. The manifestation of danger is primarily indirect: through machine degradation (visual wear), patient mortality indicators, and epidemic spread visualization. Safety is communicated through facility completeness (proper rooms, amenities, maintenance) and successful patient workflow progression. The competitive multiplayer aspect creates implicit faction dynamics through hospital rivalry, though no explicit visual faction markers exist. Environmental storytelling is achieved through queue behavior, machine condition, staff distribution, and room layout—all reflecting player decisions and operational state. The game's dark humor is evident in disease treatments and patient outcomes, which further communicates the game's satirical approach to healthcare simulation.
